name: Seneca Foods Corp
business: Seneca Foods is a leading provider of packaged fruits and vegetables, including canned, frozen, and jarred products, as well as packaged snack chips. The company sells private label products to major grocery outlets, branded products to foodservice, and products to industrial and export customers.
sellsTo: grocery outlets (supermarkets, mass merchandisers, limited assortment stores, club stores, dollar stores)
foodservice distributors and national restaurant operators
federal, state, and local governments (school and food programs)

exposures.sentence: The Company's high-quality products are primarily sourced from more than 1,100 American farms.

The Company manufactures and sells the following: private label products are sold nationwide by major grocery outlets... branded products under national and regional brands that the Company owns or licenses, including Aunt Nellie’s, CherryMan, Green Giant, Green Valley, Libby’s, READ and Seneca.
